name: wp-ulike
title: WP ULike
description: Looking to increase user engagement on your WordPress site? WP ULike plugin lets you easily add voting buttons to your content. With customizable settings and detailed analytics, you can track user engagement, optimize your content, and build a loyal following.

scripts.build:assets: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.product: npm run build && node scripts/deploy.mjs prod
scripts.build:blocks: npm run build --prefix includes/blocks/button && npm run build --prefix includes/blocks/top-content
scripts.build:blocks:i18n: npm run build:blocks && npm run i18n:json
